title: Changelog Entry
description: Schema for changelog entries in the unreleased directory

summary.description: Description of the change. Use multi-line format for longer descriptions.

type.description: Type of change determines version bump: fix/chore (patch), feat/internal (minor), break (major)

pre-release.description: Optional pre-release tag. When set, the release version includes this suffix (e.g., 1.2.0-rc.0).

ChangelogType.title: Changelog Type
ChangelogType.description: The type of change: fix/chore → patch, feat/internal → minor, break → major

PreReleaseTag.title: Pre-Release Tag
PreReleaseTag.description: Pre-release identifier appended to the version (e.g., rc → 1.2.0-rc.0)
